Notice eyebrow + announcement card (#00DD6D 13/700 eyebrow above)

positions_anatomy: filter row 1: 22 role-category chips (전체 / 서버백엔드 / 프론트엔드 / 웹풀스택 / 안드로이드 / iOS / 크로스플랫폼 / 게임클라이언트 / 게임서버 / DBA / 빅데이터 / AI ML / DevOps / 정보보안 / QA / 개발PM / HW임베디드 / SW솔루션 / 웹퍼블리셔 / VR AR 3D / 블록체인 / 기술지원) — 20px pill, single-select active uses #00DD6D
filter row 2: 4 outlined dropdowns (기술스택, 경력, 지역, 태그) — 100px pill
JobCard grid (multi-column desktop, single-col mobile expected — 0px radius cards, no shadow)

home.h1_note: No <h1> on the home page (SEO/a11y observation — flagged in §9)
h3: 회원님을 위한 AI 추천 포지션을 보고싶다면?
section grouping titles in result strip

layout_observations: Content max-width inferred ~1280px (not measured this pass — flagged for UPDATE).
Section vertical rhythm appears to use 24/32/40px spacing; not exact-captured.
No box-shadow used anywhere in sampled chrome — depth is surface-tint only (#FBFBFB footer vs #FFF page).
All cards observed at 0px radius. Pill radii are reserved for interactive controls.
Filter chip row uses horizontal scroll on mobile (CSS overflow inferred — not validated).

examples: outlined (un-hashed semantic class on filter dropdowns)
class_naming.implication: No public token-var contract; semantic intent must be inferred from rendered styles plus the rare un-hashed class names (e.g. `outlined`, `title`, `links_wrap`).

stack_fingerprint.cdn: CloudFront (ICN57 PoP, x-amz-cf-id header confirms KR-Seoul edge)
stack_fingerprint.parent_org: Saramin HR — jumpit.saramin.co.kr cname; original www.jumpit.co.kr now 301 → jumpit.saramin.co.kr

tone_observed: Developer-vernacular Korean with English keyword inlining ('#꿀 피드', 'Notice', '.zip', 'HOT', 'AI School', 'NO.1 부트캠프'). Casual, recruiter-to-engineer register rather than corporate-HR. Frequent use of trailing 's' for plural ('요즘 폼 미친 기업s').
